data.dartSource: {if (snapshot.connectionState == ConnectionState.waiting) {return const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator());} if (snapshot.hasError) {return Center(child: Text('Could not load items: ${snapshot.error}'));} final List<Item> items = snapshot.data ?? <Item>[]; return ListView.builder(itemCount: items.length, itemBuilder: (BuildContext context, int index) {final Item item = items[index]; final bool isFavorite = _favorites.isFavorite(item.id); return Card(margin: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 6), child: ListTile(title: Text(item.title), subtitle: Text(item.body), trailing: IconButton(icon: Icon(isFavorite ? Icons.star : Icons.star_border), onPressed: () {_favorites.toggle(item.id);})));});}
